description: Seed Module 8 inferential statistics curriculum data into Convex following the audited curriculum source.
deviation_notes: Added 8 statistics CCSS standards (HSS-ID.A.1, HSS-ID.A.2, HSS-ID.A.3, HSS-ID.B.6, HSS-IC.A.1, HSS-IC.B.3, HSS-IC.B.4, HSS-IC.B.5, HSS-IC.B.6) and lesson-standard links for all 5 Module 8 lessons.
